DNS configuration

resolver #1
  nameserver[0] : 192.168.151.5
  nameserver[1] : 172.18.148.3
  if_index : 12 (utun21)
  flags    : Request A records
  reach    : 0x00000000 (Not Reachable)

resolver #2
  domain   : local
  options  : mdns
  timeout  : 5
  flags    : Request A records
  reach    : 0x00000000 (Not Reachable)
  order    : 300000

  options  : mdns
  timeout  : 5
  flags    : Request A records
  reach    : 0x00000000 (Not Reachable)
